posts.author: Vijayan_N
posts.community: Embassy REIT: Is this "Blackstone" promoted REIT is real diamond?
posts.text: good article on REITs, the demand is expected to increase: growth in GCCs, SEBI reclassifying REITs as equities from Jan 2026, AI to accelerate high-quality office spaces, etc. Business Today – 13 Jul 26 How REITs are becoming a rewarding investment proposition - BusinessToday As GCCs fuel demand for premium workspaces and malls continue to attract footfalls, REITs are turning commercial real estate into a rewarding investment proposition.

posts.author: Amit2saxena
posts.community: Embassy REIT: Is this "Blackstone" promoted REIT is real diamond?
posts.text: @dd1474 What is your view about impact of AI disruption to Office REIT market in general, and Embassy REIT in particular? Do you think AI may make many jobs redundant, causing less requirement of office real estate, translating into higher office vaccanies and thus lower rentals going forward? Please share your thoughts.
